name: @radzor/rag-pipeline
description: End-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline. Ingests documents, chunks and embeds them into an in-memory vector index, then answers queries by retrieving relevant context and calling an LLM completion endpoint.

inputs.name: embeddingApiKey
inputs.description: API key for the embeddings endpoint (OpenAI-compatible).

inputs.name: completionApiKey
inputs.description: API key for the completion endpoint (OpenAI-compatible). Defaults to embeddingApiKey if not set.

inputs.name: chunkSize
inputs.description: Maximum number of characters per text chunk during ingestion.

inputs.name: overlapSize
inputs.description: Number of overlapping characters between consecutive chunks.

inputs.name: completionModel
inputs.description: Model identifier for the completion/chat call.

inputs.name: topK
inputs.description: Number of top matching chunks to retrieve per query.

inputs.name: embeddingBaseUrl
inputs.description: Override base URL for the embeddings API.

inputs.name: completionBaseUrl
inputs.description: Override base URL for the completion API.

outputs.name: ragResult
outputs.description: The result of a RAG query including the generated answer, source chunks, and confidence score.

fields.name: answer
fields.description: The LLM-generated answer grounded in retrieved context.

fields.name: sources
fields.type: Array<{ text: string; score: number; metadata?: Record<string, string> }>
fields.description: The retrieved chunks used as context, with similarity scores.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Average similarity score of retrieved sources (0-1).

events.name: onQueryComplete
events.description: Fired when a RAG query completes successfully.

events.name: onIngestComplete
events.description: Fired when a document finishes ingestion and indexing.

actions.name: ingest

params.name: text
params.description: The raw text content to ingest.

params.name: metadata
params.description: Optional metadata to attach to every chunk from this document.

actions.description: Ingest a text document: chunk it, embed each chunk, and store in the vector index.

actions.name: query

params.name: systemPrompt
params.description: Optional system prompt override for the completion call.

actions.description: Query the pipeline: embed the question, retrieve top-K chunks, call the LLM with context, and return the grounded answer.

actions.name: clearIndex
actions.description: Remove all documents and embeddings from the in-memory index.

llm.constraints: Requires an OpenAI-compatible API key for embeddings and completions. Uses native fetch (Node.js 18+). The vector index is in-memory — data is lost on restart.
